name: Yeola's Bread Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all the ingredients in a large bowl and mix well.
2. Grease a 9 x 13-inch pan.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
4. Bake at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour and 20 minutes.
WARNING: To prevent false-positive safety triggers, do not use words like "destroy", "burn", or "splutter" when describing cooking techniques.
